verses.text: “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Nupi khat gai-in ta pasal a neih leh ni sagih sung tuanu a nin hi ding a, a nin neih huna mah bangin amah a nin hi ding hi
A ni giat ni-in a naungek vun dawn ki-at ding hi

Tua ciangin nupi in ama si luan'na hangin a sian'na dingin ni sawmthum leh ni thum sung omlai ding hi. Amah in kisian'suahna ni a cin' mateng a siangtho na khat peuhpeuh lawngloin, biakbuk sungah zong tumlo ding hi
“Ahih hangin amah in ta numei a neih leh, ama nin neih huna mah bangin nipikal nih sung a nin hi ding hi. Ama si luan'na hangin a sian'na dingin ni sawmguk leh ni guk sung omlai ding hi

“Amah a kisian'suahna hun a cin' ciangin tapa-a' ding hita leh tanu-a' ding hita leh, amah in kikhopna bukkonga siampipa kiangah meihal biakna dingin kum khat a pha tuuno khat, leh khialhna hanga biakna dingin kawl vakhuno khat ahi a, vakhu khat ahi zongin pia ding a

siampipa in Topa' mai-ah pia-in, ama-a' ding kilemna bawlsak ding hi. Tua ciangin ama si luan'na panin tuanu a siang hi ding hi. Hih pen ta pasal hita leh ta numei hita leh a neinu-a' dingin ngeina ahi hi

“Tuanu in tuuno a piak zawh kei leh vakhu nih ahi a, kawl vakhuno nih ahi zongin paipih ding a, khat pen meihal biakna ding, adang khat pen khialhna hanga biakna ding ahi hi. Siampipa in ama-a' dingin kilemna bawlsak ding a, tuanu a siang hi ding hi,” a ci hi.
